name: Hiring — Application Auto Score

nodes.name: Supabase Webhook
nodes._comment: Configure in Supabase: Database → Webhooks → applications INSERT → POST to this URL

_comment: SETUP: (1) Deploy workflow, copy webhook URL. (2) Supabase → Database → Webhooks → Table: applications, Event: INSERT → POST to webhook URL. (3) Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY env vars.
